pages.text: Magic circles are ancient multiblock structures that provide persistent area effects. They are not combat spells — they are infrastructure.$(br2)To build your first circle, you need:$(br)- 4 Ancient Circle Stones$(br)- 4 Lesser Rune Stones$(br)- 1 Dormant Circle Core$(br)- 1 Attunement Chisel

Place the core in the center, rune stones on the 4 cardinal sides, and foundation stones on the 4 corners. This forms a T1 (Initiate) circle.$(br2)Right-click the core with an Attunement Chisel to validate the structure. If valid, the core will glow and display its tier.
